context: pyogenes, Bacteroides melaninogenicus, typically mixed polymicrobial flora Path:   cellulitis > abscess Age:   usually 2-4 (range, 1-6) years (atrophy of nodes with age) Lateral neck radiograph: √  thickness of retropharyngeal space > ¾ of AP diameter of vertebral body: √  may contain locules of gas / gas-fluid levels √  reversal of cervical lordosis √  anterior bowing / displacement of airway N.B.:     look carefully for possible ingested foreign body DDx:  "pseudothickening" (common in pediatric patients) ← neck flexion / incomplete inspiration US: √  hypoechoic areas + adenopathy CECT (obli
